title: German Egg Omelette
description: A classic German egg omelette recipe, perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a fork. Add the milk and whisk until smooth.
Heat the butter in a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour the egg mixture into the pan and let it cook for about 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over half of the omelette.
Use a spatula to gently fold the other half of the omelette over the cheese.
Cook for another minute, until the cheese is melted and the eggs are cooked through.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: add some chopped fresh herbs like parsley or chives on top of the omelette for extra flavor and color.
